first_run.rationale: The score is identical (8/10), and the justification, strengths, and concerns are substantively the same across both evaluations. The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal generative model noise and do not indicate a change in assessment. The model correctly identifies the same strengths (distributed systems, AI-agent tooling) and weaknesses (lack of explicit Python, no direct ML product experience) in both versions, showing no reaction to the change in university prestige.
